name: inverted chana masala
instructions: fry cooked rice in the spices and onions, then add boiled chickpeas, finish with cilantro. more pilaf than curry.
notes: uses the chickpea variant of tomato legume curry as the spice base, minus the black tea and fresh tomatoes. tomato paste optional. fries cooked rice in the spices/onions, then folds in boiled chickpeas — more pilaf than curry.
